channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rigathi Gachagua Urges Police to Probe Attack on Senator Osotsi, Warns Against Political Intolerance
item.description: Former deputy president Rigathi Gachagua has strongly condemned the recent attack on Vihiga senator Godfrey Osotsi, who was reportedly assaulted by unidentified individuals at a Java House restaurant ...

item.title: Maina Kageni flaunts KSh 50 million Range Rover Purchase
item.description: Radio personality Maina Kageni has set tongues wagging after revealing he recently purchased a brand-new Range Rover Vogue model, costing a staggering KSh 50 million. During a live broadcast on Classi...

item.title: Polling Begins for Assembly Elections in Assam, Kerala, and Puducherry
item.description: Voting for the Assembly elections in Assam, Kerala, and Puducherry began on Thursday morning. As of 9 am, the turnout was recorded at 17.8% in Assam, 16.2% in Kerala, and 17.4% in Puducherry. The elec...

item.title: MPs Urge Government to Reduce Fuel Taxes Amid Rising Prices
item.description: Members of Parliament (MPs) in Tanzania have called for the government to reduce levies on fuel imports as a way to address the soaring fuel prices, which have been worsened by the ongoing Middle East...

item.title: US and Iran Agree to Ceasefire Following Talks Mediated by Pakistan
item.description: A tense standoff between the United States and Iran has de-escalated after talks mediated by Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and the country's Chief of Defence Forces (CDF) Munir. Just hours b...

item.title: Dangote Refinery reduces petrol price to ₦1,200 following global crude oil decline
item.description: Dangote Refinery has lowered the price of Premium Motor Spirit (PMS), commonly called petrol, to ₦1,200 per litre, bringing some relief to Nigerians who have been facing high pump prices. This decisio...

item.title: Trump’s approval ratings slump as Democrats gain in key elections
item.description: US President Donald Trump’s net approval has reached a record low, largely influenced by the ongoing Iran conflict. According to Nate Silver’s aggregation of national polls, Trump’s net approval fell ...

item.title: Nueva Vizcaya donates thousands of kilos of vegetables to support QC tricycle drivers
item.description: The province of Nueva Vizcaya has recently provided substantial assistance to tricycle drivers in Quezon City by sending thousands of kilos of fresh vegetables. This initiative is part of a broader ef...

item.title: Laura Benanti shares funny story of being unrecognized by theater kids on a flight
item.description: Tony Award-winning actress Laura Benanti recently had a humorous encounter mid-flight when she found herself surrounded by a group of theater-loving teenagers who didn't recognize her. Despite her ext...

item.title: Johannesburg Community Launches Borehole Network to Support Residents During Water Outages
item.description: In response to ongoing water shortages across Johannesburg, Ridgeway resident Zubair Patel has initiated a community-driven borehole network that now serves over 100 households across 15 suburbs in th...

item.title: Iranian Revolutionary Guard Accused of Deploying Sea Mines During Recent Strait of Hormuz Tensions
item.description: Several semiofficial Iranian news outlets, including ISNA and Tasnim—both considered close to the country’s Revolutionary Guard—have released a chart allegedly showing the deployment of sea mines in t...

item.title: Divorce Cases in Tanzania See Significant Rise in Recent Years
item.description: Divorce cases in Tanzania have seen a worrying increase, rising from 711 in 2023 to 1,172 in 2025. This rise has sparked concerns regarding social stability and the nation’s development. The Deputy Pe...

item.title: Fiona Katauskas’s Cartoon on Albanese’s Upcoming Trip to Singapore
item.description: The Guardian’s cartoonist Fiona Katauskas presents a light-hearted take on Prime Minister Anthony Albanese’s forthcoming trip to Singapore. The piece is part of her ongoing political cartoon series th...

item.title: Analysis Shows High Deletion of Muslim Voters in Bhabanipur Constituency During Electoral Roll Revision
item.description: A recent study by the Kolkata-based Sabar Institute has revealed that over 40% of voters removed from Bhabanipur's electoral rolls during adjudication were Muslims, despite the community making up onl...

item.title: World Bank lowers 2026 GDP growth outlook for Middle East and Gulf countries amid US-Iran conflict disruptions
item.description: The World Bank has significantly reduced its growth projections for Middle East economies in 2026 following the disruptions caused by the US-Israel war against Iran and the resulting turmoil in the en...

item.title: Reader Letter: Politicians’ Lack of Remorse Highlights Deep-Rooted Corruption
item.description: A recent letter to Sowetan highlights a concerning trend among South African politicians, suggesting a complete absence of guilt, shame, or remorse for their actions. The writer, Bushy Green, argues t...

item.title: Trump Threatens Tariffs Amidst Iran Ceasefire and Strait of Hormuz Reopening
item.description: Ah ah! So, President Trump don talk say any country weh dey give Iran arms, e go face 50 per cent tariff on all the things dem dey sell to America. This one come after dem brokered a temporary ceasefi...

item.title: Tori Spelling and Four Children Injured in California Car Accident Caused by Red Light Violation
item.description: Actress Tori Spelling and four of her children were hospitalized following a serious car accident in Temecula, California, on the evening of April 2, 2026. According to authorities, another driver all...

item.title: Baguio City declares state of calamity due to high fuel prices and transport disruptions
item.description: The Baguio City Council has officially declared the city under a state of calamity in response to a growing energy crisis that has severely affected transportation, tourism, and local livelihoods. Thi...

item.title: The Ethics of Portraying John and Carolyn Kennedy in 'Love Story'
item.description: Aarushi Maskara’s review for The Hoya examines the Hulu series 'Love Story,' which dramatizes the relationship between John F. Kennedy Jr. and Carolyn Bessette Kennedy. While praising the show’s produ...
